title: Zero In® Bed Bug Interceptor Traps – 4 Pack, Chemical-Free Bed Bug Traps for Early Detection & Home Protection, Poison-Free, Sustainable
features: EFFECTIVE: Designed to trap and monitor bed bugs before they reach your bed, helping to prevent a full-blown infestation
POISON-FREE: Made from environmentally safe materials, our interceptors are free from harmful chemicals, making them a safe choice for families and pets
EASY-TO-USE: Simply place the interceptors under the legs of your bed or furniture to create a barrier against bed bugs. The design captures and holds pests without the need for chemical treatments
UNIVERSAL: Bed Bug blocker that fits most furniture
DISCREET & STYLISH: The white, low-profile design blends seamlessly with your bedroom decor while providing effective pest control
RE-USABLE: Rince traps with warm soapy water to use repeatedly
